features: 200 Bright LEDs Fairy Lights: With a 3 m power cable, Ollny 20 m warm white fairy light is long enough for outdoor and indoor decorations; Decorating gardens, gazebos, houses, bedrooms, stairs, and holiday events; Add festive charm to your space

8 Modes: Steady On, In Wave, Sequential, Slo-glo, Chasing Flash, Fade, Flash and Combination; Each is a surprise and easy to change with the remote; Memory function retains the last-opened mode; Lovely lights welcome an impressive night

IP44 Waterproof and Durable: Designed with high quality and waterproof material, the outdoor lights will keep working when rain and snow are coming; 31V low voltage makes all enjoy the lovely lights this holiday season and don't worry about the touch

4 Brightness: Dimmable levels are 100%, 75%, 50%, and 25%, making the lights bright or pastel; Easy to create a festive atmosphere and perfect for any family with kids, couples, or individuals who want to take their decorations to the next level

3 Timers: Setting the Timer to make the lights light up every night automatically; You do not need to turn them on or off repeatedly; Convenient string lights is also great for your wedding, party, Valentine's Day, Easter, Thanksgiving Day and celebrations

IP44 Waterproof Ollny outdoor fairy lights are made of high-quality material and waterproof technology, safe, flexible, and practical, to meet the decoration needs of indoor and outdoor occasions, such as your house, party, room, or garden, and create a relaxed atmosphere. Perfect for Indoor Use & Outdoor Lighting Soft Glow Not Harsh Ollny fairy lights emit a soft glow without glare. 4 Adjustable brightness, which can even be used while sleeping. 3 Timers & Memory Function Make these string lights light up every night automatically. You do not need to turn them on/off repeatedly! Save energy during the day.
